title: OWM-Dataset
description: This dataset comprises processed intracranial EEG recordings from frontal and temporal cortical regions in 13 epilepsy patients performing a load-3 object working memory task. The recordings include 6498 ms trials spanning fixation, encoding, and delay periods, with artifact-rejected data organized by channel and subject. The dataset supports investigation of neural mechanisms underlying working memory maintenance and cognitive control in human intracranial recordings.
methods_description: Intracranial EEG recordings were obtained from frontal (left and right middle frontal gyrus) and temporal (left and right middle temporal gyrus) regions during a load-3 object working memory task. Data underwent artifact rejection procedures at the single-trial level, with trial structure consisting of 1000 ms fixation, 1500 ms encoding, and 3998 ms delay periods. Trials were concatenated per channel and stored in EDF format with zero-padding for consistent array lengths across channels within subjects.
